case_title: SILAS, DON DEMETRIUS VS INTERNATIONAL HOSTEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SILAS, DON DEMETRIUS AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL HOSTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26201, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
PLAINTIFF REQUEST TO CONTINUE HEARING DATE TO JAN 13'00 AT 1:30 PM SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISS. FOR APPROVAL. PLAINTIFF HAS FEE WAIVER.
FILE TAKEN BY FRANCES (MOTION TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AND SENT TO PRO TEM, RE: APPEAL JUDGMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-06-1999, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-13-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILAS, DON DEMETRIUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL HOSTEL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL HOSTEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILAS, DON DEMETRIUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL HOSTEL PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $74 COSTS JUDGT ENTERED IN SCA 26201 ON 3-17-00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL HOSTEL
MOTION TO VACATE FILED IN SUP. COURT BY PLAINTIFF ORDERED DENIED. NO APPEARANCE.
